prompt: Create an ornate vertical fantasy anime illustration of Ame-no-Uzume dancing in a sacred cave shrine, framed like a luxurious Japanese mythological tarot card. The composition has 1 central female dancer standing on one bare foot on a round wooden kagura stage, her other knee raised, one arm lifted high holding a golden suzu bell wand with trailing red ribbons, and the other arm extended gracefully outward. She wears a revealing layered miko-inspired ceremonial outfit: flowing white kimono sleeves, red inner lining, gold floral embroidery, black-and-gold ornate waist ornaments, braided cords, tassels, anklets, and jewelry; her long dark hair streams dramatically around her body beneath a large floral-gold divine headdress. Her face should be softly obscured or left featureless rather than detailed. Behind her is a blinding warm golden cave opening with a thick shimenawa rope and 6 hanging paper shide streamers above it. Surround the stage with 6 background attendants or deities, 3 on the left and 3 on the right, partially hidden in shadow with indistinct or softly obscured faces, raising hands or instruments as if worshipping and celebrating the dance. Add swirling petals, sparkling star-like lights, mist, ribbons, and a deep indigo-purple cavern filled with magical reflections. Use an extremely elaborate gold filigree border with 4 large corner floral ornaments, dangling tassels, bells, gemstones, and a circular chrysanthemum crest at the top center and bottom center. Lighting is dramatic and divine, with intense backlight, warm gold highlights, cool blue-violet shadows, glossy fabric, intricate ornament detail, dynamic motion, high fantasy, highly detailed anime painting, cinematic vertical poster, no readable text.
